ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emails" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email */,
  "from_email" TEXT /* Email address of the sender */,
  "email_type" TEXT /* Type of email (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the email was sent */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the email content */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the email */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the email has been read */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the email has been deleted */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template used for the email, if any */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email campaign, if applicable */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Exact time the email was sent (including time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES email_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email the recipient is associated with */,
  "recipient_email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of recipient (e.g., To, CC, BCC) */,
  "is_opened" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the recipient has opened the email */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time the email was opened by the recipient */,
  "is_clicked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the recipient has clicked any links in the email */,
  "click_time" TEXT /* Time the recipient clicked any links in the email */,
  "is_unsubscribed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the recipient has unsubscribed from future emails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipients_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the email template */,
  "template_content" TEXT /* Content of the email template */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the template was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the template */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the template was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the template is active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_template_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email template the variable is associated with */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., name, time) */,
  "variable_value" TEXT /* Value of the variable */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the variable is required in the template */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the variable if not provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_template_variables_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES email_templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_open_rates" (
  "open_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each open rate record */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email the open rate is associated with */,
  "open_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the email was opened */,
  "total_recipients" INTEGER /* Total number of recipients of the email */,
  "open_rate" REAL /* Calculated open rate as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_open_rates_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "click_through_rates" (
  "ctr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CTR record */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email the CTR is associated with */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of times links in the email were clicked */,
  "total_links" INTEGER /* Total number of links in the email */,
  "ctr" REAL /* Calculated click-through rate as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ctr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_click_through_rates_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email content record */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email the content is associated with */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the email */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the email content */,
  "content_size" INTEGER /* Size of the email content in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_content_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., email administrator, marketer, employee) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object storing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the email */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the email was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the email was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_access_logs_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "email_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email the attachment is associated with */,
  "attachment_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment */,
  "attachment_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the attachment */,
  "is_inline" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the attachment is inline (e.g., embedded images) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_attachments_email_id FOREIGN KEY ("email_id") REFERENCES emails ("email_id")
)
